Functions
fza_dms_fnc_getNearestFcrTargetData
Description

Finds the nearest FCR target row to a world position, with a max distance.

Parameters
_heli

the helicopter

_positionASL

reference world position (ASL)

_maxDistance

max match distance in metres [200]

Returns

Matching FCR row or [] when no nearby match exists.

Author

Snow(Dryden)
